CustomField.description: Benchmark term as specified in business plan or management team. This field is not editable by marketing reps and is set by the pricing team at the Aircraft In Campaign level (on Marketing Campaign)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Benchmark term as specified in business plan or management team. This field is not editable by marketing reps and is set by the pricing team at the Aircraft In Campaign level (on Marketing Campaign)
CustomField.label: Benchmark Term (Mos.)
